meta.title: Interview with Justine Bone of MedSec on St. Jude Disclosures / Short Selling
meta.description:
Vulnerability disclosure is always a controversial topic, and in the end the person or company finding the vulnerability gets to decide what to do with it.

MedSec tried a different path. They licensed the vulnerability information to Muddy Waters, who then published intentionally non-specific information on the vulnerabilities and shorted the stock. MedSec had a financial interest in St. Jude's stock price going down.

Dale Peterson interviewed MedSec CEO Justine Bone at S4x17 to better understand the vulnerabilities, what MedSec hoped to accomplish, why they chose this path, if they believed it was ethical to profit in this way, and if Justine or MedSec will do this again.
